message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== wrapper.v: all top-level inout ports ==="
grep "inout " "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -40

echo ""
echo "=== How many inout ports? ==="
grep -c "inout " "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo ""
echo "=== Are amuxbus signals connected inside wrapper? ==="
grep -A2 -B2 "clk_amuxbus_a" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== What does DEF template define as ports/pins? ==="
grep -c "PIN " "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def" 2>/dev/null
grep "^PINS" "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def" 2>/dev/null | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

=== wrapper.v: all top-level inout ports ===

PINS 1381 ;
